judge_result.short_rationale: The incident is skin exposure, but the answer gives eye-exposure instructions (rinse eyes, remove contact lenses). It omits the required immediate actions to remove contaminated clothing/shoes and wash exposed skin with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes. Although it includes escalation, the core guidance is wrong-incident and unsafe.
